# Jewel in Christ Foundation

> Faith-driven NGO empowering women through skills training, entrepreneurship, advocacy, and community outreach across Nigeria.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Mission overview, impact stats, and latest stories.
- [About](/#about): Who we are, leadership, and our values.
- [Programs](/programs): Vocational training, entrepreneurship, economic empowerment, support & advocacy, community outreach.
- [Events](/events): Upcoming events and ways to participate.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from outreach, programs, and community events.
- [Blog](/#blog): Stories from the field and impact updates.
- [Testimonials](/testimonials): Voices from beneficiaries, partners, and volunteers.
- [Donate](/donate): Support the mission via WhatsApp.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the foundation.
